name: Arthur

skills.name: Holy Vanguard
skills.description: Invokes the protection of the divine light to recover Health continuously. If Movement Speed is impaired, the Health restored is doubled.

skills.name: Valiant Charge
skills.description: Enhances the next Basic Attack into a dash, dealing extra damage and silencing enemies.

skills.name: Whirling Strike
skills.description: Deals damage over time to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Might of Excalibur
skills.description: Jumps to the target enemy hero to deal damage. Launches all heroes within range.

tips: Arthur (Tank): Tier S on international ranked — 50.54% WR.
Build core: Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.54%, pick 1.47%, ban 0.15%, popularity tier S.
Counters Han Xin, Arke · Weak into Xiang Yu, Lady Sun.

faqs.question: Is Arthur good in current season?
faqs.answer: Arthur is Tier S Tank with 50.54% win rate, 1.47% pick rate, and 0.15% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Arthur build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, Blazing Cape, Longnight Guardian, Ominous Premonition. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Arthur?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Arthur: Xiang Yu, Lady Sun. Arthur is strong into Han Xin, Arke.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Han Xin, Arke. Countered by: Xiang Yu, Lady Sun.
